mapper.select: SELECT d.CHECKIN_ID AS checkinId, d.SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, d.EXERCISE_ID AS exerciseId, d.EXERCISE_NAME AS exerciseName, d.CALORIES_PER_MINUTE AS caloriesPerMinute, d.DURATION_MINUTES AS durationMinutes, d.CALORIES_BURNED AS caloriesBurned, r.RECORD_TIME AS recordTime FROM CHECKIN_RECORDS r INNER JOIN CHECKIN_EXERCISE_DETAILS d ON r.CHECKIN_ID = d.CHECKIN_ID WHERE r.USER_ID = #{userId} AND r.CHECKIN_TYPE = 2 AND r.CHECKIN_DATE = #{checkinDate} AND r.DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY r.RECORD_TIME DESC
